title: Authorized to import project (Doc Staff)
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Open Import Project page
expectedResult: Page is accessible (See heading "นำเข้าโครงการ")

title: Authorized to import project (Rep)
steps:
1. Login as user `facilities_rep` with password `facilities_rep` (Role: Facilities Rep)
2. Open Import Project page
expectedResult: Page is accessible (See heading "นำเข้าโครงการ")

title: Unauthorized import project (Guest)
testData: Import Project URL: /app/project-import
steps:
1. Login as user `guest` with password `guest` (Role: Guest)
2. Open Import Project URL
expectedResult: User is redirected (Don't see heading "นำเข้าโครงการ")

title: Unauthorized import project (Fin Staff)
testData: Import Project URL: /app/project-import
steps:
1. Login as user `finance_staff` with password `finance_staff` (Role: Finance Staff)
2. Open import URL
expectedResult: User is redirected (Don't see heading "นำเข้าโครงการ")

title: Unauthorized import project (Con Staff)

steps:
1. Login as user `contract` with password `contract` (Role: Contract)
2. Open import URL
expectedResult: User is redirected (Don't see heading "นำเข้าโครงการ")

title: Unauthorized import project (Proc Staff)
testData: Import Project URL: /app/project-import
steps:
1. Login as user `procurement1` with password `procurement1` (Role: Procurement1)
2. Open import URL
expectedResult: User is redirected (Don't see heading "นำเข้าโครงการ")

title: Unauthorized import project (Proc Head)
testData: Import Project URL: /app/project-import
steps:
1. Login as user `proc_head1` with password `proc_head1` (Role: Procurement Head1)
2. Open import URL
expectedResult: User is redirected (Don't see heading "นำเข้าโครงการ")

title: Reject invalid uploaded file
prerequisites:
1. User can access to Import Project Page
2. User have non-.xlsx/.xls file.
testData: Non-.xlsx/.xls file
steps: Upload non-.xlsx/.xls file to the system
expectedResult: UI shows error: "รองรับเฉพาะไฟล์ Excel .xlsx และ .xls"

title: Reject oversized Excel file
prerequisites:
1. User can access to Import Project Page
2. User have .xlsx/.xls file that over 50 rows
testData: Over 50 rows .xlsx/.xls file
steps: Upload .xlsx/.xls file over 50 rows to the system
expectedResult: UI shows error indicating the file must not exceed 50 rows (Note: Exact message depends on implementation, e.g., "จำนวนแถวต้องไม่เกิน 50 แถว")

title: Accept valid Excel file
prerequisites:
1. User can access to Import Project Page
2. User have .xlsx/.xls file that below 50 rows
testData: Below 50 rows .xlsx/.xls file
steps: Upload valid Excel file
expectedResult: UI shows the table with data inside the Excel file correctly

title: LessPaper required fields
prerequisites:
1. User can access to Import Project Page
2. User have .xlsx/.xls file that below 50 rows
steps: Upload LessPaper file missing required fields, then click submit
expectedResult: Row errors shown for LessPaper no., project, detail, method, budget, unit, department, fiscal year

title: LessPaper duplicate PR existing
prerequisites:
1. User is authorized as Document Staff
2. A project with LessPaper number "9999" already exists in the system
testData: LessPaper Excel file containing row with `lesspaper_no` = 9999
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Upload the LessPaper Excel file
4. Click the submit button
expectedResult: The cell for lesspaper_no shows an error: "เลขที่หนังสือ Lesspaper ซ้ำกับโครงการที่มีอยู่แล้ว"

title: LessPaper duplicate PR in upload
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: LessPaper Excel file containing 2 rows with the same `lesspaper_no` = 8888
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Upload the LessPaper Excel file
4. Click the submit button
expectedResult: The duplicate rows show an error in lesspaper_no cells: "เลขที่หนังสือ Lesspaper ซ้ำกันในชุดนำเข้า"

title: LessPaper budget numeric/positive
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData:
LessPaper Excel file with 3 rows:
- Row 1: `budget` = abc
- Row 2: `budget` = 0
- Row 3: `budget` = -500
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Upload the LessPaper Excel file
4. Click the submit button
expectedResult:
The budget cell shows validation errors:
- Row 1: "วงเงินงบประมาณต้องเป็นตัวเลข"
- Row 2 and 3: "วงเงินงบประมาณต้องมากกว่า 0"

title: LessPaper procurement budget range
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: LessPaper Excel file with procurement method "LT100K" but `budget` = 150000
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Upload the LessPaper Excel file
4. Click the submit button
expectedResult: The budget cell shows method-specific range error: "ต้องไม่เกิน 100,000 บาท"

title: LessPaper future delivery date

title: LessPaper edit table
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: LessPaper Excel file with valid rows
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Upload the LessPaper Excel file
4. Edit an editable cell (e.g., Budget) in the data table
expectedResult: The values are successfully updated and system revalidates the new values correctly

title: LessPaper delete row
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: LessPaper Excel file with 2 valid rows
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Upload the LessPaper Excel file
4. Click the delete icon (ลบ) on the first row
expectedResult: The row is removed from the table and only 1 row remains

title: Fiori PR required
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff

2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Upload the Fiori Excel file
4. Click the submit button
expectedResult: The pr_no cell shows an error: "กรุณาระบุเลขที่ใบขอซื้อขอจ้าง"

title: Fiori edit/delete rows
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: Fiori Excel file with 2 valid rows
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Upload the Fiori Excel file
4. Edit a cell (e.g., Budget) on the first row
5. Click the delete icon (ลบ) on the second row
6. Click confirm to proceed
expectedResult: The edits on the first row are persisted and the second row is successfully excluded from the import

title: Representative single unit lock
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Unit Representative with access to only one unit
steps:
1. Login as user `facilities_rep` with password `facilities_rep` (Role: Facilities Rep)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Open manual creation form
expectedResult: Department and unit dropdowns default to the user's assigned organization and are locked (read-only)

title: Representative multiple own units
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Unit Representative with access to multiple units under the same department
steps:
1. Login as user `facilities_rep` with password `facilities_rep` (Role: Facilities Rep)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Open manual creation form
expectedResult: Department dropdown is locked; Unit dropdown is selectable but only shows units the user is assigned to

title: Procurement user organization select
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Open manual creation form
expectedResult: User can freely select any allowed department and unit from the dropdowns

title: Manual required fields
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Open manual creation form
4. Leave required fields empty and click the submit button ("ยืนยัน")
expectedResult: Validation errors are shown for required fields (e.g., "กรุณาระบุชื่อโครงการ", "กรุณาเลือกวิธีการจัดหา")

title: Manual duplicate PR
prerequisites:
1. User is authorized as Document Staff
2. A project with `pr_no` = "1000000001" already exists in the system
testData: Form data with `pr_no` = "1000000001"
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Open manual creation form
4. Fill in the existing PR number
5. Click the submit button ("ยืนยัน")
expectedResult: The PR number field shows a duplicate error: "เลขที่ใบขอซื้อขอจ้างซ้ำกับโครงการที่มีอยู่แล้ว"

title: Manual budget numeric/positive
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: Form data with budget as "abc", "0", or "-100"
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Open manual creation form
4. Enter non-number, 0, or negative value in the budget field
5. Click the submit button ("ยืนยัน")
expectedResult: The budget field shows validation errors (e.g., "วงเงินงบประมาณต้องเป็นตัวเลข" or "วงเงินงบประมาณต้องมากกว่า 0")

title: Manual procurement budget range
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: Form data with procurement method "LT100K" but budget set to 150000
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Open manual creation form
4. Select method "LT100K" and enter budget 150000
5. Click the submit button ("ยืนยัน")
expectedResult: The budget field shows method-specific range error: "ต้องไม่เกิน 100,000 บาท"

title: Budget plan options scoped
prerequisites:
1. User is authorized as Document Staff
2. Budget plans exist for specific units and fiscal years
testData: Select a specific unit and fiscal year that have available budget plans
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Open manual creation form
4. Select the specific unit and fiscal year
5. Open the budget plan multi-select dropdown
expectedResult: The dropdown only shows unused budget plans that match the selected unit and fiscal year

title: Budget plan display details
prerequisites:
1. User is authorized as Document Staff
2. Budget plans exist for the selected unit/year
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Open manual creation form
4. Select unit and fiscal year
5. Open the budget plan multi-select dropdown
expectedResult: The dropdown correctly displays the activity name, cost center/unit, and budget amount for each plan

title: Budget auto-sum default
prerequisites:
1. User is authorized as Document Staff
2. Multiple budget plans are available
testData: Select 2 budget plans with amounts 10,000 and 20,000
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Open manual creation form
4. Select multiple budget plans from the dropdown
expectedResult: The budget field automatically defaults to the sum of the selected plans (e.g., 30,000)

title: Budget lower-than-plan warning
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: Select budget plans summing to 30,000, then override the budget field to 20,000
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Open manual creation form
4. Select budget plans
5. Override the budget field to a value lower than the sum of the selected plans
6. Click the submit button ("ยืนยัน")
expectedResult: A warning text "จำนวนเงินน้อยกว่าวงเงินงบประมาณที่ตั้งไว้" appears under the budget field, and a confirmation dialog pops up requiring the user to confirm before creation proceeds

title: Delivery warning uses frontend urgency logic
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: Select a delivery date that is earlier than the standard working-day threshold (e.g., 2 days from now)
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Open manual creation form
4. Select an early delivery date
5. Click the submit button ("ยืนยัน")
expectedResult: A warning modal titled "วันที่ส่งมอบน้อยกว่าปกติ" appears. The user must click confirm ("ยืนยันและสร้างโครงการ") to proceed

title: Fiscal year receive prefix
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: Select fiscal year "2568"
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Create a project using either manual form or import, specifying fiscal year 2568
4. Check the generated receive number
expectedResult: The generated receive number (Reference Number) prefix matches the selected fiscal year (e.g., "2568/XXXXX")

title: Frontend urgency calculation
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: Dates across different urgency thresholds
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Create projects with delivery dates crossing different urgency thresholds
4. Inspect the API payload or database
expectedResult: The payload correctly sends the urgency level derived from the frontend `calculateUrgentLevel` logic

title: Create project unassigned
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: Valid manual form data
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Fill and submit the manual creation form successfully
4. Check the project status
expectedResult: The newly created project appears with status "ยังไม่ได้มอบหมาย" (Unassigned)

title: Workgroup pool routing
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: Project with specific procurement method
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Create a project with a specific procurement method
4. Check the workgroup pools
expectedResult: The project is correctly routed to the responsible pool based on the procurement method mapping

title: External success navigation
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Unit Representative
testData: Valid manual form data
steps:
1. Login as user `facilities_rep` with password `facilities_rep` (Role: Facilities Rep)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Create a project successfully
4. Click "create more" or equivalent success action button
expectedResult: The system navigates back to the manual creation form

title: Internal success navigation
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document/Procurement Staff
testData: Valid manual form data
steps:
1. Login as Document/Procurement Staff
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Create a project successfully
4. Click "import more" or equivalent success action button
expectedResult: The system navigates back to the import method selector page

title: Back to all projects
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: Valid manual form data
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Create a project successfully
4. Click "back to all projects" action button
expectedResult: The system navigates to the all projects dashboard page

title: LessPaper template download
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Click the LessPaper template download button
expectedResult: The system successfully downloads a usable LessPaper Excel template file

title: Fiori template download
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
steps:
1. Login as user `document_staff` with password `document_staff` (Role: Document Staff)
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Click the Fiori template download button
expectedResult: The system successfully downloads a usable Fiori Excel template file (with PR column explicitly marked as required)
